summary: Fixed the QA R3 dead/incapacitated invariant gap. sim.record-character-status now rejects incapacitating an already-dead M3 character without mutating authoritative state, and validateWorldStateV0 now emits stable invalid-schema paths when dead characters are incapacitated or when dead/incapacitated characters remain active office or enfeoffment holders.

tests_run.result: Expected failed-first R3 run after adding regressions: record-character-status still accepted incapacitating an already-dead character, and validateWorldStateV0 returned only hash-mismatch for malformed unavailable holder state instead of the new structured semantic paths.
12 test files passed; 75 tests passed, including new repeated-status and unavailable office/enfeoffment holder regressions.
Node/worker hashes matched: hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; deterministic canaries matched; root Vitest 22 files/134 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001
tests_run.result: task JSON parse/shape OK: M3-SUCCESSION-STATE-MACHINE-001 IN_PROGRESS.

Shows task-scoped protocol/sim-core/test edits, project coordination state files, prior routed review message artifacts, and this R3 handoff under project/messages. No forbidden path edits were introduced by the R3 fix.
No banned randomness/time/unsafe-cast/any matches found in R3-touched implementation and test files.

decisions: Kept the R3 fix limited to QA-requested command/status semantics, M3 world-state semantic validation, and focused regression tests.

Rejected only the impossible transition of incapacitating an already-dead character; death continues to normalize incapacitated characters to alive=false and incapacitated=false while vacating authority holdings.

Classified dead-and-incapacitated characters and unavailable active holders as invalid-schema semantic state errors because these are authoritative M3 state invariants needed before hash-only diagnostics.
Applied availability checks to all non-null M3 office holders and active enfeoffment holders; policies remain intact and are still validated separately.
risks: This remains an R3 authoritative simulation state/schema behavior change and needs systems_architect review before QA re-review.
Directly hand-mutated malformed states can still also report hash-mismatch in addition to the new structured semantic errors; the requested stable invalid-schema paths are now present.
requested_action: Review the R3 dead/incapacitated command and world-state invariant fix, then route to qa_reviewer for re-review if acceptable.
